How It Works
Simple to Use. Built to Last.
01
🔍
Discover Freely
Browse categories or search the archive. No account needed — anyone can explore and view records from anywhere in the world.
02
📥
Download Originals
Create a free account to download full resolution originals. Sign up in 30 seconds using email, Google or Apple.
03
📤
Contribute
Upload documents to preserve them permanently. Earn the First Contributor marker — your name is attached to that record forever.
04
✓
Verify Together
The community votes on authenticity. The best-verified content rises to the top. Everyone benefits from everyone's expertise.
🔒 Permanently Preserved
Every document uploaded to Archivable is stored permanently using distributed file storage and secured on the blockchain — making records tamper-proof and impossible to lose. Learn how it works →

Do You Have Something
Worth Preserving?

A floor plan, a family photo, a permit, a newspaper clipping — things that seem ordinary today become invaluable tomorrow. Share it with the world and preserve it forever.
